race.comment: The 125K VOBIS Gold Strike is restricted to juvenile fillies to be run over 1000m. ANGELIC RISE (2) ended her initial 2-start prep with a solid run for third at Caulfield-Heath in the spring. Her jump-out form has always been strong, and she looks well placed to give this a big shake. DIVINE DOT (1) showed pace to win her debut, and then was fast early, before weakening late at her last start before having a spell. She has won the most recent of her tune-up trials, and she will be ready to rumble fresh. UNKECHAUG (10) makes her debut with plenty of jump-out experience behind her. If the pole position is an advantage, then she can make an immediate impact. Check the market. DIVINE ERUPTION (6) is a local filly who has won 2 of her 4 jump-outs, and with Linda Meech in the irons, you know that her intentions to race handy early are clear. Don't risk her. IVY (4) was a tad disappointing in both of her starts to date in better fields. She resumes, and her jump-out form has been strong.

Live1.SchedulerNote: Provincial - Use extended Racing.com coverage where possible
